_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:pi-sandbox
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-07-02 (crew leto re-tasked from pilot; operator made sandbox THE priority — it's the unlock for Pi + DGX local models). Pi-in-a-sandbox via @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime (srt); both platforms mac-first; v1 network=OPEN. SPIKE FIRST = hk-f39ny (P1 GATE): sandboxed process reaches local daemon over unix socket + one model API call + resolve Go-CLI-TLS. Then hk-p7smp profile-gen -> hk-rlxgx argv-wrap -> hk-6596l config -> hk-i0377 acceptance (commit-inside-succeeds/write-to-main-denied/branch-merges); hk-ryi34 attach + hk-5zviv linux (P2). Artifacts: .kerf/works/pi-sandbox/. Brief: plans/2026-07-02-pi-sandbox/HANDOFF.md. epic_id:null (kerf work, not a bead-epic) — ready-count tracked via label codename:pi-sandbox.

lanes.label: codename:pilot
lanes.note: PROVEN + PARKED 2026-07-02. Pi runs live end-to-end: hk-d5q5l (1-line doc bead) ran on agent_type=pi (gpt-5.4-mini via OpenRouter), committed + merged in 2min. CAPABILITY FINDING: gpt-5.4-mini commits trivial doc/string beads but exits-without-committing on real Go code (config struct+wiring) — below the ceiling for the scavenger drain. OPERATOR DIRECTIVE: HOLD all Pi running until the sandbox is built, then test DGX/local + a couple models via the sandbox; model/provider decision (OpenAI-subscription-direct vs OpenRouter vs local) deferred to then. ROUTING FOOTGUN: pi-q default_harness did NOT route unlabeled beads to pi; the harness:pi LABEL is required (else silent claude fallback) — needs fix/doc bead.

lanes.label: codename:remote-hardening
lanes.note: DONE/BANKED 2026-07-02. Epic hk-gx0dl CLOSED. 98 gb-mbp jobs; 2 hard blockers fixed+validated live; hk-nepva landed a real bead on main from gb-mbp; proven conc-3. Residual = benign non_ff merge churn hk-1u4wp (P3). gurney STOOD DOWN + RESERVED to route the operator's incoming REAL work to gb-mbp when it lands.

lanes.label: codename:keeper-redesign
lanes.note: DRAINED 2026-07-02. All beads closed. Crew paul STOPPED. Durable keeper-launcher fix hk-5266t (P1, zsh :a target bug) still OPEN + carried (it's the no_tmux_target/keeper-missing bug class that bit leto tonight). P3 follow-up hk-os0hq unranked.

lanes.label: codename:scavenger
lanes.note: PARKED 2026-07-02. Standing serial orphan-backlog drainer (~110 ready). Was briefly the fuel source for the Pi drain (now held). Un-park per operator alignment.
